pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 4.0.2 to 3.3.4 to align with Java 21 ecosystem and modern Spring features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.x is not yet stable/standard for J21 migration in this context; moving to 3.3.4 ensures compatibility with Java 21 LTS and current Spring ecosystem standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile for Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if J21-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven.compiler.release property to explicitly set the bytecode target to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiled classes are compatible with Java 21 runtime; without it, default compiler settings might not target J21 correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename artifact ID and name from 'music-catalog' to 'musiccatalog' and 'MusicCatalog' for consistency.
Update project description to be more descriptive.
Remove explicit Tomcat version override and CVE fix comment.
Add Spring Data JPA starter dependency for database access.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter dependency for bean validation.
Add PostgreSQL driver dependency for database connectivity.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Add Flyway PostgreSQL database dependency for PostgreSQL-specific migration support.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Remove explicit AssertJ exclusion and patched version dependency, relying on Spring Boot managed versions.
Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use Lombok as an annotation processor.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, Lombok annotations will not be processed during compilation, leading to compile errors for missing getters/setters/etc.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Checkstyle plugin with Flyway Maven plugin for database migration management.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/e.general_idea: Refactor Album entity to use JPA relationships and Lombok annotations instead of manual getters/setters and primitive fields.
Add bidirectional OneToMany relationship for Tracks with lazy loading and cascade operations.
Add bidirectional ManyToMany relationship for Genres with join table configuration.
Update constructor to accept Artist entity and initialize collections, removing ID from constructor.
Add helper methods for managing bidirectional relationships (addTrack, addGenre, clearGenres).

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Rename the DTO class from AlbumDto to AlbumDTO to follow standard Java naming conventions.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.why_exists: Compile error: class 'AlbumDto' cannot be found; the class has been renamed to 'AlbumDTO'.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Remove Spring @Component annotation to convert the mapper into a plain utility class.
Add a private constructor to enforce the utility class pattern and prevent instantiation.
Change the mapping method to static to align with the utility class design.
Update the method body to map new fields including genres and tracks using Java 16+ List.of/toList.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.before: return new AlbumDto(album.getId(), album.getTitle(), album.getArtist(), album.getYear());

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.general_idea: Add necessary imports for the new mapping logic involving Genre, Set, and Streams.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/m.why_exists: Compile error: cannot find symbol 'Genre', 'Set', 'Collectors', or 'TrackMapper'.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Replace in-memory map-based repository implementation with Spring Data JPA interface to enable database persistence.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.why_exists: The old implementation used a custom in-memory Map which does not interact with a database; migrating to JPA is required to use Spring Data JPA features and persist data, making the old class structure incompatible with the new interface-based approach.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to the removed in-memory implementation.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.why_exists: The imports for ArrayList, LinkedHashMap, Map, AtomicLong, and Repository are no longer used in the new interface-based implementation, causing unused import warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.general_idea: Add imports for Spring Data JPA annotations and base interface.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/r.why_exists: The new implementation uses JpaRepository and EntityGraph, which require these imports to compile.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Rename import from AlbumDto to AlbumDTO to match new naming convention.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.why_exists: Class AlbumDto no longer exists; compilation fails with 'cannot find symbol' if old name is used.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Add import for TrackDTO used in new service methods.
Add imports for entity classes Album, Artist, Genre, and Track.
Add imports for exception handling classes.
Add imports for ArtistRepository and GenreRepository.
Refactor service to inject ArtistRepository and GenreRepository instead of AlbumMapper.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.why_exists: Compilation fails because AlbumMapper is removed and new repositories are required for logic.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Replace findAll method with getAll using direct mapping and toList.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.why_exists: Method signature and implementation changed; old method name and return type (List<AlbumDto>) are invalid.

src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.general_idea: Replace findById method with getById that throws exception on not found.
src/main/java/com/example/musiccatalog/s.why_exists: Method signature and behavior changed; old method name and return type (Optional<AlbumDto>) are invalid.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Migrate configuration syntax from Spring Boot 2.x properties format to Spring Boot 3.x YAML-style properties format.
src/main/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (required for JDK 21) uses a different default configuration parsing strategy where the 'server.port' key is often expected in a hierarchical or specific format, or this change aligns with a broader migration to YAML/structured properties required by the new framework version.
